summary: This is a brief announcement post where Joel Spolsky advertises a paid summer internship position in graphic design or web design at Fog Creek Software in New York City. The post asks readers to spread the word to any students who might be interested. There is no substantive argument or analysis — it is purely a job listing promotion.
key_points: Fog Creek Software was offering a paid summer internship in graphic/web design
The internship was located in New York City
Joel used his blog's readership as a recruiting channel
money_quotes: If you know a student in graphic design or web design looking for a paid summer internship in New York City, tell them about Fog Creek!
key_insight: Joel leveraged his popular blog as a direct recruiting tool for Fog Creek internship positions.
